verdict_reasoning: APPL1 is a BAR-PH domain adaptor protein with documented localization to endosomal membranes and signal-induced nuclear translocation. The NCBI summary places it on intracellular endosomal compartments, not the plasma membrane outer leaflet. No transmembrane domain, GPI anchor, or stable surface-anchoring mechanism is described. No documented PM pool or surface-accessible isoform.
